subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou in Whose grasp lie the reins of all things! Glorified art Thou, O Thou in Whose right hand is the kingdom of eternity! Glorified art Thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من فی قبضتک زمام الاشیاء سبحانک یا من فی یمینک ملکوت البقاء سبحانک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
